task.title: Fix Data Loader Memory Spike
task.description: test_data_loader intermittently consumes too much memory during batch iteration.
constraints: Do not load more than 40 batches

steps.thought: Inspect the flaky data loader test.
steps.observation: Test loads 20 batches and checks memory stays below 200MB.
Loader stores each loaded batch in a list without clearing.

steps.thought: Reproduce memory spike using a single test run.
steps.observation: Memory usage rises to ~260MB — above threshold.

steps.thought: Run a lightweight benchmark with 30 batches to analyze memory growth.
steps.observation: Memory grows linearly; batches never released.

steps.thought: Fix the issue by clearing processed batches after yielding.
Re-run test to confirm memory stays stable.
Run a 30-batch benchmark again to verify.

arguments.new_str: Memory spike caused by storing all batches; fixed by clearing list after yield.
